channel.title: WordPress Engineering Blog
channel.description: Latest posts from the engineering team

item.title: Scaling Our Elixir Infrastructure
item.dc:creator: Sarah Chen
item.description: How we scaled our Elixir services to handle 10x traffic growth.
item.content:encoded:
Over the past year, our team has been working on scaling our Elixir infrastructure to handle significant traffic growth.

The Challenge

Our existing GenServer-based architecture was hitting limits at around 50,000 concurrent connections. We needed to rethink our approach.

The Solution

We implemented a distributed supervision tree using :pg process groups and dynamic supervisors.

defmodule MyApp.DistributedWorker do
  use GenServer
  # ... implementation details
end

The results were impressive: we now handle 500,000+ concurrent connections with sub-millisecond latency.

item.title: Introducing Our New CI Pipeline
item.dc:creator: Marcus Johnson
item.description: A walkthrough of our new continuous integration setup.
item.content:encoded:
We recently overhauled our CI pipeline to reduce build times by 60%.

Key changes included parallel test execution, better caching strategies, and incremental compilation.
